subcodes.title: Words to newspaper reporters, spoken on 1912-04-11
subcodes.first_line: Our object is universal peace and the unity of humankind. I have traveled to Paris and London and now I have come to America... One of these ills is the people's restlessness and discontent under the yoke of the war expenditures of the world's governments.... It is the war which is today the cause of all trouble.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصد ما صلح عمومی و وحدت انسانی است سفری در پاریس و لندن بودم
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal education
